title: Crispy Earthy Veal Stir-fry
description: A one-pot Uruguayan dish featuring tender veal in a rich, savory sauce that's both earthy and crispy, perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Add veal pieces and brown on all sides, about 5 minutes per side. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add red wine vinegar, tomato paste, lemon zest, salt, pepper powder, and basil leaves. Deglaze by scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Add bell peppers to the saucepan with the remaining ingredients, stir well, then return veal to the pan, turning to coat evenly in the sauce.
Cover the pan, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 10-15 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Sprinkle a few drops of olive oil on top before serving for added crunchiness.
